guidance: Scale RE to 10,110 MW by 2030; NIRL secured 2 GW (incl 600MW solar + 300MW/1,800MWh ESS).
NIRL IPO planned FY27 (25% stake); 1.4 GW RE assets transferred to NIRL for monetization.
insights: FY26 consolidated PAT record ₹3,769cr (+39%); standalone ₹2,525cr; revenue ₹21,525cr (+15%).
Q4 PAT surged 189% YoY; EBITDA margin ~43%.
Coal production 19.14 MT (+11.3%); Pachwara South (9 MTPA) began March 2026.
Added 1,013 MW in FY26: 660 MW Ghatampur Unit-2 (thermal) plus 303 MW RE.
concall.orderExecution: NIRL executes 2 GW of secured RE plus storage toward 10 GW by 2030, with an NIRL IPO slated for FY27.
concall.source: Q4 FY26 results / investor meet, May 2026

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
